mnemonics: META-DATA: Metadata Explains The Arrangement & Describes All Attributes
keyPoints: Metadata provides context and meaning to data, making it understandable and usable.
It is crucial for data integration, ensuring data from different sources can be combined accurately.
It supports data governance, quality control, and system efficiency by documenting data lineage, definitions, and rules.
commonMistakes: Treating metadata as an afterthought rather than a core component of the data architecture.
Failing to maintain and update metadata, leading to inaccurate and untrustworthy data documentation.
